page.title: Experience Starlite 2027 with a Luxury Marbella Yacht Charter

data.meta_description: Book a Starlite Marbella yacht charter 2027 with our fleet departing Puerto Banús. Combine concert nights with luxury cruising from €749/2h. Enquire now.
data.summary: Experience the Starlite Festival 2027 in Marbella with a luxury yacht charter from Puerto Banús. Combine world-class concerts with sunset cruises, private dining, and overnight stays on board.
key_facts: Starlite Festival 2027 runs July–August in Marbella, with concerts at the Cantera de Nagüeles.
Our fleet departs Puerto Banús, 10 minutes from the Starlite venue by car.
Charters from €749/2h (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39) include skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT.
Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a jet ski for pre-concert water sports.
All charters include fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%) – no hidden fees.
Combine a daytime cruise with a Starlite evening: dock back at Puerto Banús by 20:00.
Private transfers from Puerto Banús to the festival can be arranged on request.
Book early for 2027 – Starlite tickets sell out months in advance.

faq.q: How far is Puerto Banús from the Starlite Festival venue?
faq.a: Puerto Banús is about 6 km (10 minutes by car) from the Cantera de Nagüeles, where Starlite is held. We can arrange a private transfer from the marina to the festival and back after the concert.

faq.q: Can I combine a daytime yacht charter with a Starlite evening concert?
faq.a: Absolutely. Most of our charters return to Puerto Banús by 20:00, giving you time to freshen up and reach the festival before the headline act. We recommend a 4-hour or 8-hour charter for a full day on the water plus the concert.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges for crew or fuel.

faq.q: Which boats are best for a Starlite evening?
faq.a: For a couple or small group, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) are ideal at €749/2h. For a larger party, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a jet ski and departs from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: Can I stay overnight on the yacht after the concert?
faq.a: Yes, overnight stays are possible on select yachts like the Ferretti 94 (29m) or Mangusta 80. Please enquire via WhatsApp for availability and pricing – we can arrange mooring in Puerto Banús.

faq.q: How do I book a Starlite yacht charter for 2027?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, boat type, and number of guests. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Starlite tickets are sold separately through the festival website.
Cancellations made 14+ days before the charter date receive a full refund. Within 7–13 days, a 50% refund applies. Less than 7 days, no refund. We recommend travel insurance for Starlite events.
No. The price you see includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. Gratuities are optional. The only extra is if you request a private transfer to the festival.

data.body_html:
Starlite Marbella is one of Europe's most glamorous summer festivals, drawing world-class artists to the Cantera de Nagüeles each July and August. For 2027, you can elevate the experience by pairing a concert night with a luxury Starlite Marbella yacht charter 2027 from Puerto Banús. Cruise the Costa del Sol by day, then step ashore for a headline show – all without the crowds or traffic.

Why combine a yacht charter with Starlite 2027?

Starlite attracts over 100,000 visitors each season, with acts ranging from pop icons to flamenco legends. Arriving by yacht means you skip the parking queues and enjoy a private pre-concert dinner on the water. Our fleet departs from Puerto Banús, just 10 minutes from the festival venue, so you can cruise to Cabopino or Estepona and return in time for the 21:00 curtain.

For groups of 8–12, the Marbella yacht charter experience becomes a full-day affair: swim stops at Cala del Faro, jet-skiing off the Mangusta 80, and sunset cocktails before the concert.

Best boats for a Starlite evening

Our fleet offers options for every group size and budget. All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and 21% VAT – no hidden costs.

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – €749/2h. Perfect for couples or small families.
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – €749/2h. Spacious flybridge for sunset views.
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – €4,719 minimum 4h. Includes a jet ski for pre-concert fun.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – pricing on request. Ideal for overnight stays.
  • Pershing 46 (14m, 10 pax) – pricing on request. Sporty and fast.

Sample itinerary: Day cruise + Starlite night

Here's how a typical Starlite yacht charter day unfolds:

  • 12:00 – Board your yacht at Puerto Banús. Welcome cava and briefing.
  • 12:30 – Cruise towards Cabopino, with a swim stop at Cala Cortés.
  • 14:00 – Light lunch (snacks included) on deck. Anchor near the dunes.
  • 16:00 – Return towards Marbella Marina, passing the Golden Mile.
  • 18:00 – Dock at Puerto Banús. Freshen up or enjoy a pre-concert drink.
  • 20:00 – Private transfer (arranged on request) to Cantera de Nagüeles.
  • 21:00–23:30 – Starlite concert. Return transfer to the marina.
  • Overnight – Sleep aboard (select yachts) or head to your hotel.

What's included in every charter

Transparency is key. Every booking includes:

  • Licensed skipper (English & Spanish speaking)
  • Fuel for the full itinerary
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks (olives, crisps, nuts)
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%) – no surprises

Starlite 2027 dates and tips

The festival typically runs from early July to late August, with concerts most nights. Headliners for 2027 are announced in spring. To secure the best yacht and avoid disappointment, book your Starlite Marbella yacht charter 2027 as early as possible – popular dates like weekends and big-name acts sell out months ahead.

Pro tip: Choose a 4-hour charter (€749 for Tier A boats) for a relaxed afternoon cruise before the concert. If you want jet-skiing or swimming at multiple coves, the 8-hour option gives you more flexibility.

Frequently asked questions

How far is Puerto Banús from the Starlite Festival venue?

Puerto Banús is about 6 km (10 minutes by car) from the Cantera de Nagüeles, where Starlite is held. We can arrange a private transfer from the marina to the festival and back after the concert.

Can I combine a daytime yacht charter with a Starlite evening concert?

Absolutely. Most of our charters return to Puerto Banús by 20:00, giving you time to freshen up and reach the festival before the headline act. We recommend a 4-hour or 8-hour charter for a full day on the water plus the concert.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No extra charges for crew or fuel.

Which boats are best for a Starlite evening?

For a couple or small group, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) are ideal at €749/2h. For a larger party, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) includes a jet ski and departs from Puerto Banús.

Can I stay overnight on the yacht after the concert?

Yes, overnight stays are possible on select yachts like the Ferretti 94 (29m) or Mangusta 80. Please enquire via WhatsApp for availability and pricing – we can arrange mooring in Puerto Banús.

How do I book a Starlite yacht charter for 2027?

Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, boat type, and number of guests. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. Starlite tickets are sold separately through the festival website.

What is the cancellation policy?

Cancellations made 14+ days before the charter date receive a full refund. Within 7–13 days, a 50% refund applies. Less than 7 days, no refund. We recommend travel insurance for Starlite events.

Are there any hidden fees?

No. The price you see includes skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA. Gratuities are optional. The only extra is if you request a private transfer to the festival.
